description: Current customer information. Also see the Person and Store tables.

columns.name: customerid
columns.description: Primary key.

columns.name: personid
columns.description: Foreign key to Person.BusinessEntityID

columns.name: storeid
columns.description: Foreign key to Store.BusinessEntityID

columns.name: territoryid
columns.description: ID of the territory in which the customer is located. Foreign key to SalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryID.

columns.name: creditcardid
columns.description: Primary key for CreditCard records.

columns.name: cardtype
columns.description: Credit card name.

columns.name: cardnumber
columns.description: Credit card number.

columns.name: expmonth
columns.description: Credit card expiration month.

columns.name: expyear
columns.description: Credit card expiration year.

columns.name: currencyrateid
columns.description: Primary key for CurrencyRate records.

columns.name: currencyratedate
columns.description: Date and time the exchange rate was obtained.

columns.name: fromcurrencycode
columns.description: Exchange rate was converted from this currency code.

columns.name: tocurrencycode
columns.description: Exchange rate was converted to this currency code.

columns.name: averagerate
columns.description: Average exchange rate for the day.

columns.name: endofdayrate
columns.description: Final exchange rate for the day.

description: Cross-reference table mapping ISO currency codes to a country or region.

columns.name: countryregioncode
columns.description: ISO code for countries and regions. Foreign key to CountryRegion.CountryRegionCode.

columns.name: currencycode
columns.description: ISO standard currency code. Foreign key to Currency.CurrencyCode.

description: Lookup table containing standard ISO currencies.

columns.name: currencycode
columns.description: The ISO code for the Currency.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Currency name.

description: Cross-reference table mapping people to their credit card information in the CreditCard table.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Business entity identification number. Foreign key to Person.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: creditcardid
columns.description: Credit card identification number. Foreign key to CreditCard.CreditCardID.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to Customer.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Name of the store.

columns.name: salespersonid
columns.description: ID of the sales person assigned to the customer. Foreign key to SalesPerson.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: demographics
columns.description: Demographic informationg about the store such as the number of employees, annual sales and store type.

description: Contains online customer orders until the order is submitted or cancelled.

columns.name: shoppingcartitemid
columns.description: Primary key for ShoppingCartItem records.

columns.name: shoppingcartid
columns.description: Shopping cart identification number.

columns.name: quantity
columns.description: Product quantity ordered.

columns.name: productid
columns.description: Product ordered. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

columns.name: datecreated
columns.description: Date the time the record was created.

columns.name: specialofferid
columns.description: Primary key for SpecialOffer records.

columns.name: description
columns.description: Discount description.

columns.name: discountpct
columns.description: Discount precentage.

columns.name: type
columns.description: Discount type category.

columns.name: category
columns.description: Group the discount applies to such as Reseller or Customer.

columns.name: startdate
columns.description: Discount start date.

columns.name: enddate
columns.description: Discount end date.

columns.name: minqty
columns.description: Minimum discount percent allowed.

columns.name: maxqty
columns.description: Maximum discount percent allowed.

description: Individual products associated with a specific sales order. See SalesOrderHeader.

columns.name: salesorderid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to SalesOrderHeader.SalesOrderID.

columns.name: salesorderdetailid
columns.description: Primary key. One incremental unique number per product sold.

columns.name: carriertrackingnumber
columns.description: Shipment tracking number supplied by the shipper.

columns.name: orderqty
columns.description: Quantity ordered per product.

columns.name: productid
columns.description: Product sold to customer. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

columns.name: specialofferid
columns.description: Promotional code. Foreign key to SpecialOffer.SpecialOfferID.

columns.name: unitprice
columns.description: Selling price of a single product.

columns.name: unitpricediscount
columns.description: Discount amount.

columns.name: salesorderid
columns.description: Primary key.

columns.name: revisionnumber
columns.description: Incremental number to track changes to the sales order over time.

columns.name: orderdate
columns.description: Dates the sales order was created.

columns.name: duedate
columns.description: Date the order is due to the customer.

columns.name: shipdate
columns.description: Date the order was shipped to the customer.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Order current status. 1 = In process; 2 = Approved; 3 = Backordered; 4 = Rejected; 5 = Shipped; 6 = Cancelled

columns.name: onlineorderflag
columns.description: 0 = Order placed by sales person. 1 = Order placed online by customer.

columns.name: purchaseordernumber
columns.description: Customer purchase order number reference.

columns.name: accountnumber
columns.description: Financial accounting number reference.

columns.name: customerid
columns.description: Customer identification number. Foreign key to Customer.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: salespersonid
columns.description: Sales person who created the sales order. Foreign key to SalesPerson.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: territoryid
columns.description: Territory in which the sale was made. Foreign key to SalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryID.

columns.name: billtoaddressid
columns.description: Customer billing address. Foreign key to Address.AddressID.

columns.name: shiptoaddressid
columns.description: Customer shipping address. Foreign key to Address.AddressID.

columns.name: shipmethodid
columns.description: Shipping method. Foreign key to ShipMethod.ShipMethodID.

columns.name: creditcardid
columns.description: Credit card identification number. Foreign key to CreditCard.CreditCardID.

columns.name: creditcardapprovalcode
columns.description: Approval code provided by the credit card company.

columns.name: currencyrateid
columns.description: Currency exchange rate used. Foreign key to CurrencyRate.CurrencyRateID.

columns.name: subtotal
columns.description: Sales subtotal. Computed as SUM(SalesOrderDetail.LineTotal)for the appropriate SalesOrderID.

columns.name: taxamt
columns.description: Tax amount.

columns.name: freight
columns.description: Shipping cost.

columns.name: totaldue
columns.description: Total due from customer. Computed as Subtotal + TaxAmt + Freight.

columns.name: comment
columns.description: Sales representative comments.

description: Cross-reference table mapping sales orders to sales reason codes.

columns.name: salesorderid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to SalesOrderHeader.SalesOrderID.

columns.name: salesreasonid
columns.description: Primary key. Foreign key to SalesReason.SalesReasonID.

description: Cross-reference table mapping products to special offer discounts.

columns.name: specialofferid
columns.description: Primary key for SpecialOfferProduct records.

columns.name: productid
columns.description: Product identification number. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key for SalesPerson records. Foreign key to Employee.BusinessEntityID

columns.name: territoryid
columns.description: Territory currently assigned to. Foreign key to SalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryID.

columns.name: salesquota
columns.description: Projected yearly sales.

columns.name: bonus
columns.description: Bonus due if quota is met.

columns.name: commissionpct
columns.description: Commision percent received per sale.

columns.name: salesytd
columns.description: Sales total year to date.

columns.name: saleslastyear
columns.description: Sales total of previous year.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Sales person identification number. Foreign key to SalesPerson.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: quotadate
columns.description: Sales quota date.

columns.name: salesquota
columns.description: Sales quota amount.

description: Lookup table of customer purchase reasons.

columns.name: salesreasonid
columns.description: Primary key for SalesReason records.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Sales reason description.

columns.name: reasontype
columns.description: Category the sales reason belongs to.

columns.name: territoryid
columns.description: Primary key for SalesTerritory records.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Sales territory description

columns.name: countryregioncode
columns.description: ISO standard country or region code. Foreign key to CountryRegion.CountryRegionCode.

columns.name: "group"
columns.description: Geographic area to which the sales territory belong.

columns.name: salesytd
columns.description: Sales in the territory year to date.

columns.name: saleslastyear
columns.description: Sales in the territory the previous year.

columns.name: costytd
columns.description: Business costs in the territory year to date.

columns.name: costlastyear
columns.description: Business costs in the territory the previous year.

description: Sales representative transfers to other sales territories.

columns.name: businessentityid
columns.description: Primary key. The sales rep.  Foreign key to SalesPerson.BusinessEntityID.

columns.name: territoryid
columns.description: Primary key. Territory identification number. Foreign key to SalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryID.

columns.name: startdate
columns.description: Primary key. Date the sales representive started work in the territory.

columns.name: enddate
columns.description: Date the sales representative left work in the territory.

columns.name: salestaxrateid
columns.description: Primary key for SalesTaxRate records.

columns.name: stateprovinceid
columns.description: State, province, or country/region the sales tax applies to.

columns.name: taxtype
columns.description: 1 = Tax applied to retail transactions, 2 = Tax applied to wholesale transactions, 3 = Tax applied to all sales (retail and wholesale) transactions.

columns.name: taxrate
columns.description: Tax rate amount.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Tax rate description.
